{{CargoRelic
|name=Occult Snake Eye
|class_id=20291
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The eye of the Occult Snake God can banish living beings directly into the endless void, erasing all traces of their existence. To this day, no one has ever seen a life return from the void.
|fame=17
|art=13
|fth=31
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +2<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss2=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss3=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +4<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss4=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +4<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss7=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +4<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200<br> (Awakened)
}}
